corporate_income_tax.label: CIT Mexico 2025
corporate_income_tax.notes: ISR 30% flat; PTU 10% of taxable profit paid to employees; border zone IVA 8%

effective_date_range.basis: Target ruleset/params year; jurisdiction fiscal calendars and transitional periods may differ.

rate_threshold_assumptions: Rates and thresholds are simplified for LedgerField estimates.
